title: ## **Balance Sheet Overview – As of December 31, 2026**
content:
# Portfolio Composition
Cash and deposits increased to $81,668 million, up 42.3%. Investment securities rose to $220,423 million, up 2.7%, adding to the earning-asset base.
Loans and leases grew to $662,809 million, up 1.6%.
Other assets moved more modestly, ending near $83,699 million combined.

# Funding Sources
The largest component on the balance sheet is loans and leases at $662,809 million; that growth was funded primarily through shares/deposits.
